scripts.dev: echo 'ERROR: Use ./init.sh to start dev servers. See CLAUDE.md' && exit 1
scripts.dev:server: echo 'ERROR: Use ./init.sh to start dev servers. See CLAUDE.md' && exit 1
scripts.dev:all: echo 'ERROR: Use ./init.sh to start dev servers. See CLAUDE.md' && exit 1
scripts.build:sidecar: bun build --compile apps/server/src/index.ts --outfile apps/desktop/src-tauri/binaries/server-$(rustc -vV | grep host | cut -d' ' -f2)
